name: Chase Brown
headline: Three-Down Bengal Workhorse Primed For A Full-Season Leap
body:
Brown's 2025 ledger reads like a foundational fantasy asset: an RB9 finish on 213.6 points across 17 games, with 232 carries for 1,019 yards (4.39 per pop), six rushing scores, and a genuine receiving floor of 69 grabs for 437 yards plus five touchdowns. The 14.5% target share and 47 red-zone opportunities, including 12 goal-line carries, confirm Cincinnati funnels its highest-value touches through him.

The efficiency tells the only cautionary tale, a slightly negative minus-0.046 EPA per play and modest 1.97 yards after contact, but Brown's profile spiked dramatically once Joe Burrow returned, and his usage never wavered. Drafters are paying up accordingly, with a top-20 overall ADP and an RB11 price tag. A full slate behind a healthy Burrow points squarely at career-best volume and clear top-tier upside in 2026.
